title: Infinite Dragon Eggs
description: Ensures a dragon egg spawns each time a dragon is killed, regardless of whether a dragon has been killed before.
body:
# Infinite Dragon Eggs

**Infinite Dragon Eggs** is a lightweight server-side Fabric mod that ensures a dragon egg spawns **every** time the Ender Dragon is killed, not just the first time. Perfect for multiplayer servers or players who want multiple eggs for building, trading, or collecting.

## 📦 Features

-  Spawns a **dragon egg** with **every dragon kill**
-  Works **regardless** of whether a dragon has been killed before
-  Fully server-side, **no client installation required**
-  Simple, no config needed, just install and play

## 🔧 Compatibility

- **Mod Loader:** Fabric  
- **Environments:** Server-side only  

## 🛠 Installation

1. Install [Fabric](https://fabricmc.net/) for your Minecraft version.
2. Place the downloaded `.jar` file into your `mods` folder.
3. Launch your server and enjoy infinite dragon eggs!

##  Use Cases

- Survival servers wanting renewable dragon egg access  
- Builders needing dragon eggs for decoration  
- Economy servers where dragon eggs have trade value  


##  Credits

Created by [Foksha](https://modrinth.com/user/Foksha)

Need help or [support](https://github.com/FokshaWasTaken/infinite-dragon-eggs/issues)?
---

*Every dragon deserves an egg. Now they’ll always leave one behind.*
